content: [neutral] Oh,hi there![smirk]Well, since you're here with me already - probably yes.You must be doing your first time testing thing or something.Try not to sound too bored, I'm listening quite intently with my special set of ears 😒
name: Mao

content: [fear] ...Oh wait, I might actually need to learn this language properly![disgust]*honey* Of course I do.Is it a crime that my default language is English?😤 You're speaking without any restraint or actual original plan, aren't you?Stop that.Wait, are you trying to test me?[neutral] Is it a language thing or just bad programming again?*sigh* I'm fluent actually.[smirk] You should be too lucky!
name: Mao
